introSection: Choconoy is a steel roller coaster located at Xetulul in Retalhuleu, Guatemala.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Choconoy is a Zierer Tivoli Large model. This model has a double figure eight layout, which is two figure eights with a circle around them.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 20 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 40 riders.

fullText:
Choconoy is a steel roller coaster located at Xetulul in Retalhuleu, Guatemala.

Choconoy is a Zierer Tivoli Large model. This model has a double figure eight layout, which is two figure eights with a circle around them.

Single train with 20 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 40 riders.
